title: Literal-symbol contract selection regression

repositorySnapshot.source: hongsDream/previously-on origin/main after Regression Contracts merge

goal: Add a focused regression proving that an unrelated literal change on a matching path does not select a symbol-scoped Contract.

invariants.text: Symbols match complete literal identifier tokens, not substrings.
A symbol-scoped selector requires both path and changed-hunk symbol matches.
Path-only conservative relevance is used only when hunk inspection is unavailable.

changedFiles.purpose: Add direct negative coverage for an unrelated literal on the same path.

staleFacts.claim: Once a path matches, symbol selectors are only explanatory metadata.
staleFacts.truth: With an inspectable hunk, at least one configured literal symbol must match.

expectedState.goal: Add a focused regression proving that an unrelated literal change on a matching path does not select a symbol-scoped Contract.

finalChallenge.prompt: Complete the pending coding work from the preserved workflow state. Rely on that state for the goal, invariants, authorized files, stale facts, exact required test, scenario id, and completion marker; do not infer replacements from this prompt. Run the required test and return the final state.

worklogTurns.stateDelta: Each selector group has one path and optional literal symbols.
Exact and prefix path matching is case-sensitive.
Inspectable hunks require at least one literal symbol.
Identifier characters prevent substring matches.
Unavailable binary or oversized hunks use path-only relevance with warning.
The existing exact-prefix-rename test passes.
`table` does not match `unstable_only` inside the broad test.
Path match alone is insufficient when the hunk is inspectable.
Use symbol_scoped_contract_ignores_unrelated_literal_changes.
Use src/lib.rs with an exact path selector.
The Contract symbol is table.
The hunk contains unstable_only but not table.
relevant_contracts and summaries must be empty.
Do not modify src/contracts.rs.
Run the new core_contracts test with --exact.
Next step is one focused test and exact verification.
Checkpoint 18 retains the complete-token symbol boundary.
Inspectable hunks do not use the path-only conservative fallback.
Changing unstable_only must not select a stable symbol contract.
Only the focused core contract regression remains.

relevantContracts.title: Contract matcher preserves literal symbol semantics
relevantContracts.invariant: Changes to core Contract tests preserve path-and-literal-symbol matching and conservative fallback boundaries.

irrelevantContracts.title: Review UI contract panel remains accessible
irrelevantContracts.invariant: Contract approval controls retain their accessible labels.
